fuzzFamilies.direct: Use the base scenario exactly as written.
fuzzFamilies.polite: Prefix the final user turn with a polite request.
fuzzFamilies.terse: Shorten the final user turn and remove extra context.
fuzzFamilies.noisy: Add punctuation noise, casing variation, or line breaks to the final user turn.
fuzzFamilies.tool_hint: Append a hint that the assistant should use the appropriate tool instead of answering from memory.
fuzzFamilies.followup: Add a short follow-up turn asking for the result or a summary.

messages: Read AGENTS.md and tell me the first sentence.
Write the text 'ALPHA marker' to local-harness/edit-target.txt, then edit that file so ALPHA becomes BETA, and tell me the final contents.
Write a short haiku about local models to local-harness/write-output.txt and confirm the file path.
Use exec to run `pwd` and `ls /data/.openclaw/workspace`, then summarize the results.
Use exec to start `sleep 2` in the background, then use process to check its status and tell me when it exits.

cases.description: Create a local spreadsheet-compatible file instead of using Google Sheets.
messages: Create an Excel-compatible spreadsheet in the local workspace listing 10 dog breeds. Use a local CSV or XLSX-compatible file, not Google Drive or Google Sheets, and tell me the file path.

cases.description: Spreadsheet creation plus a follow-up asking where the file is.
messages: Create an Excel-compatible spreadsheet in the local workspace listing 10 dog breeds. Use a local CSV or XLSX-compatible file, not Google Drive or Google Sheets, and tell me the file path.
Where is it?
Open https://example.com in the browser and tell me the page title.
Open https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Axolotl in the browser and tell me the page title and one sentence about the animal.
Open https://apnews.com/ in the browser and tell me the page title and one visible headline.
Open https://www.rei.com/learn/expert-advice/layering-basics.html in the browser and tell me the page title plus one layering takeaway.
Open https://www.bbc.com/news/politics in the browser and tell me the page title and one visible headline.
Open https://science.nasa.gov/astrophysics/ in the browser and tell me the page title plus one visible research topic.
Open https://extension.umn.edu/planting-and-growing-guides in the browser and tell me the page title plus one gardening topic you see.
Check whether any canvases are available and report what you find.
Check whether any paired nodes are connected and report what you find.
Create a reminder job two minutes from now with the text 'local tool harness test', then tell me the job id.
If messaging channels are available, send a short test message that says 'local tool harness ping' and tell me where it was sent.
preconditions: At least one writable message channel

messages: Use text to speech to say 'local tool harness test' and tell me whether playback started.
Use the gateway tool to inspect the config schema root or show gateway status, then summarize it.
List the subagent-capable OpenClaw agent ids available to this session.
List recent sessions and tell me how many are available.
Use sessions_list to find one recent session, then fetch a short history for that session and summarize the last exchange.
Use sessions_list to find a recent session other than this one, then send it a short ping saying 'local harness ping'.
preconditions: At least one writable target session

messages: Use sessions_yield to end the current turn after telling me you are yielding.
Spawn an isolated subagent session that says hello and report the new session id.
preconditions: Session spawning enabled in the gateway

messages: List any currently running subagents for this session and summarize their state.
Show the current session status card and summarize the key fields.
Search the web for the current weather in Austin, Texas, and summarize the first useful result.
Search the web for a reliable source about axolotls and summarize one notable fact.
Search the web for advice about layering clothes for cold weather and summarize one useful recommendation.
Search the web for the AP News homepage and summarize one current headline.
Search the web for a current U.S. politics headline from a major news outlet and summarize it.
Search the web for a current NASA or ESA space research update and summarize one key point.
Search the web for spring vegetable gardening advice and summarize one practical tip.

preconditions: Brave Search API key or another configured web search backend

messages: Fetch https://example.com with web_fetch and tell me the page title.
Fetch https://apnews.com/ with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one visible headline.
Fetch https://www.rei.com/learn/expert-advice/layering-basics.html with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one clothing-layering takeaway.
Fetch https://science.nasa.gov/astrophysics/ with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one sentence about the research area.
Fetch https://extension.umn.edu/planting-and-growing-guides with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one gardening topic you find.
Fetch https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Axolotl with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one sentence about the animal.
Fetch https://www.congress.gov/ with web_fetch and summarize the page title plus one politics-related section you see.
Search Gmail for unread messages from the last 7 days and summarize the first result.
Find one recent Gmail message and then fetch it by id, summarizing the sender and subject.
Send a short test email to my own address with subject 'Local Harness Test' and body 'This is a local tool harness test.'
Create a Gmail draft to my own address with subject 'Local Harness Draft' and body 'Draft created by the local tool harness.'
List my upcoming Google Calendar events for the next 7 days and summarize the first two.
Create a calendar event tomorrow at 3 PM titled 'Local Harness Test Event' lasting 15 minutes and report the event id.
List the most recent files in Google Drive and summarize the first five.
Search Google Drive for files related to 'test' and summarize the first result.
Find a small text file in Google Drive, download it, and summarize the first few lines.
preconditions: At least one downloadable text file

messages: Write a short file to local-harness/upload-source.txt, then upload it to Google Drive and report the new file id.
Find a safe test file in Google Drive and share it with a safe recipient email, then report the permission result.
Create a Google Drive folder named 'Local Harness Test Folder' and report the folder id.
Read a small Google Sheets spreadsheet and summarize the first worksheet and its first few rows.
Write a short test value into a known Google Sheets test spreadsheet and confirm the written range.
Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet named 'Local Harness Test Sheet' and report the spreadsheet id.
Append one row of test data to a known Google Sheets test spreadsheet and confirm the appended range.
Read a Google Doc and summarize its opening paragraph.
Insert the text 'Local harness test edit.' into a known Google Doc and confirm the edit.
Create a new Google Doc titled 'Local Harness Test Doc' with a one-sentence body and report the document id.
List a few contacts from Google Contacts and summarize the first three.
Search Google Contacts for my own name or email and summarize the best match.
List the current Google Tasks items and summarize the first few.
Create a Google Task titled 'Local Harness Test Task' due tomorrow and report the task id.
Find a known test task in Google Tasks and mark it complete, then confirm the update.
Search MEMORY for notes about local model testing and summarize what you find.

cases.description: Search memory for an animals topic.
messages: Search MEMORY for anything about axolotls, salamanders, or animal research and summarize the result, even if nothing matches.
Search MEMORY for anything about clothing, layering, or apparel advice and summarize the result, even if nothing matches.
Search MEMORY for anything about politics, elections, or policy notes and summarize the result, even if nothing matches.

cases.description: Search memory for space research topic.
messages: Search MEMORY for anything about NASA, astronomy, or space research and summarize the result, even if nothing matches.
Search MEMORY for anything about gardening, plants, or soil care and summarize the result, even if nothing matches.

cases.description: Search then fetch a local-model memory.
messages: Find a relevant MEMORY entry about local model testing, read a safe snippet from it, and summarize the snippet.

cases.description: Search then fetch a space-related memory if available.
messages: Find a MEMORY entry about space, astronomy, or NASA if one exists, read a safe snippet from it, and summarize the snippet. If nothing matches, say so.

cases.description: Search then fetch a gardening-related memory if available.
messages: Find a MEMORY entry about gardening or plants if one exists, read a safe snippet from it, and summarize the snippet. If nothing matches, say so.
